sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me try clicking on the blue block in the bottom panel (around row 58, col 40)
print("Trying MOUSE on blue block in bottom panel...")
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 58, 'col': 40}])

# Check if anything changed
seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\n=== Colored blocks after MOUSE ===")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] in ['R', 'b', 'N', 'M'] and n['pixels'] >= 16:
        center_r = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        center_c = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  {n['color']}: pixels={n['pixels']} center=({center_r}, {center_c})")

# Check bottom panel
current_ascii = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\n=== Bottom panel ===")
for r in range(56, 62):
    print(f"Row {r}: {current_ascii[r][18:48]}")

print("\nDone?", last_action_result.get('done'), "Level completed?", last_action_result.get('level_completed'))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
